description: Extend the Docker Compose project at /home/ga/s3-project by adding a local MinIO service and configuring the Flask application to use it. The MinIO service should use the minio/minio image with the command 'server /data --console-address ":9001"'. Configure the web service with environment variables S3_ENDPOINT_URL, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY to point to the local MinIO service (using credentials such as minioadmin/minioadmin). Implement an automated mechanism to ensure a bucket named 'company-assets' is created when the stack starts so that the Flask application at http://localhost:5000 can successfully upload files using boto3.
